name: stream single fp32
description: iterateTensorsSchemaful on a single-tensor schemaful doc yields exactly that tensor with dequantized data in Float32Array form. bytes_hex is the same as the schemaful.json 'schemaful single fp32' vector.

name: stream multi-tensor sorted order
description: iterateTensorsSchemaful yields tensors in canonical (alphabetically sorted) name order regardless of insertion order in the source doc. 'bias' precedes 'weight' lexicographically; verify the iterator yields bias first.

name: stream mixed dtypes
description: iterateTensorsSchemaful correctly materialises different dtypes in a single doc: int32 'indices' and fp32 'values', both yielded in canonical order (i < v).

name: stream qint8 dequantization
description: iterateTensorsSchemaful applies scale dequantisation for QINT8 tensors: stored bytes are int8 q-values; iterator yields Float32Array of (q - zero_point) * scale. scale=2^-7=0.0078125 gives lossless round-trip for values in [-1, 1].
